text:

the most recent version of py39-sphinx-5.3.0,1 is already installed
===>   py39-pip-22.3.1 depends on package: py39-sphinx>=4.2,1<5.2,1 - not found
*** Error code 1

Similar to Bug 267918

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=267918

Yet again, unsetting DOCS allows the package to build.
